name: Miro
description: Monitor Miro team members and board organization for collaboration compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Miro at https://miro.com
2. Go to your Profile Settings > Your apps (or https://miro.com/app/settings/user-profile/apps)
3. Create a new app or use an existing one
4. Under 'OAuth scopes', enable: boards:read, team:read
5. Install the app to your team
6. Copy the access token
7. Paste it below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Miro team members and their access roles

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Miro boards are organized for team separation
